name: california-san-mateo
description: San Mateo County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: San Mateo County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past San Mateo County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('San Mateo County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: San Mateo County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract San Mateo County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-san-mateo-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-san-mateo-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
The page is a listing page for the Board of Supervisors, indicated by the active link 'Board of Supervisors' in the utility menu.

Representative data is likely contained within a main content region, possibly using a grid or list layout with specific class names like 'region--administrative__page_top' or similar content wrappers.
Photo URLs are likely relative paths (e.g., '/images/...') requiring absolutization to the base URL 'https://www.smcgov.org'.
District and party information may be present in text elements within the representative cards or list items.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for San Mateo County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: San Mateo County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for San Mateo County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: San Mateo County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
NOTE: UNCERTAIN — San Mateo uses its own system (shapethefuture.org / smcacre.gov); no NetFile AID confirmed.
